title: S + V + as well as / in addition to + N/V-ing

formulas.formula: S + V + as well as + N/V-ing
formulas.zh: 主詞＋動詞＋as well as（除……之外還）＋名詞/動名詞

formulas.formula: S + V + in addition to + N/V-ing
formulas.zh: 主詞＋動詞＋in addition to（除……之外還）＋名詞/動名詞

explanation: as well as 與 in addition to 均表「除……之外還有」的附加關係。重點是動詞與主要主詞一致，不受後接的名詞或動名詞影響。as well as 用於正式與非正式場合；in addition to 較正式，後接名詞或動名詞形式。兩者都用來補充說明主詞的額外行為或屬性。需注意主動詞時態要與主要主詞相符，不因後接詞彙而改變。

examples.eng: She speaks English as well as French fluently.
examples.chi: 她不但說英文流利，法文也說得流利。

examples.eng: The director in addition to the actors attended the premiere event.
examples.chi: 除了演員之外，導演也參加了首映式。

examples.eng: Playing the piano as well as composing music is his passion.
examples.chi: 彈鋼琴和作曲都是他的熱情所在。

examples.eng: The company will expand sales in addition to improving product quality.
examples.chi: 除了改善產品品質外，公司還將擴大銷售。

extension.tip: 動詞單複數由主要主詞決定，不因 as well as/in addition to 後的詞彙而改變。in addition to 後須接名詞或 V-ing 形式，不接原形動詞。注意主要主詞若為單數，動詞必須單數；若為複數，動詞必須複數。

examples.test: The teacher as well as the students (is/are) happy.
examples.result: → 正確：is（以 teacher 為主）；錯誤：are（忽視主要主詞）

examples.test: He enjoys reading in addition to (write/writing) novels.
examples.result: → 正確：writing（in addition to 後接 V-ing）；錯誤：write（違反語法）

examples.test: She speaks French as well as English (good/well).
examples.result: → 正確：well（修飾動詞 speaks，用副詞）；錯誤：good（應為副詞）

extension.note: 記住：主要主詞決定動詞，後接詞只是補充；in addition to 後一定是名詞或 V-ing。

parts: the staff enjoys the new office environment.
exercises.sentence: The manager as well as the staff enjoys the new office environment.
exercises.translation: 經理和全體職員都喜歡新辦公室環境。

exercises.sentence: In addition to attending classes, students must complete homework assignments.
exercises.translation: 除了上課之外，學生還必須完成家庭作業。

exercises.sentence: The athlete practices basketball as well as swimming every day.
exercises.translation: 這位運動員每天既練籃球也練游泳。

parts: In addition to improving customer service, the company will
exercises.sentence: In addition to improving customer service, the company will expand its product line.
exercises.translation: 除了改善客服之外，公司還將擴大產品線。
